channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Putin-Xi talks revive stalled Russian gas pipeline as Iran war rattles energy markets
item.description: Putin is expected to hold talks with Chinese leader Xi Jinping on Wednesday, with the long-stalled Power of Siberia 2 natural gas pipeline topping the agenda.

item.title: Another Trump victory: Republican Rep. Thomas Massie loses Kentucky primary
item.description: President Donald Trump had targeted Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., for opposing GOP priorities.

item.title: U.S. Treasurys are now firmly in the 'danger zone,' strategists say
item.description: U.S. Treasurys are in a "danger zone" as surging long-term yields raise fears that sticky inflation could begin spilling over into equities, strategists said.

item.title: Why fashion is doubling down on sustainability even as value-seeking shoppers ignore the pitch
item.description: A strange paradox has taken hold of the global fashion industry.

item.title: Stocks under pressure as correction fears grow and record rally defies geopolitical turmoil
item.description: "'The pendulum could swing backwards," analysts said on Tuesday amid mounting warnings that equities could soon change course.

item.title: Looking for attractive Asian stocks outside of AI? HSBC names 10 ‘forgotten gems’ for investors
item.description: HSBC picked out companies that have generated high return on equity, gained market share while remaining highly profitable and paying out strong dividends.

item.title: Over 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers set to strike as wage talks break down, sending shares lower
item.description: More than 47,000 Samsung Electronics workers will begin a strike on Thursday after wage negotiations between the company and its union broke down.

item.title: Alibaba reveals more powerful Zhenwu AI chip, new LLM
item.description: Alibaba announced updates to its AI offerings, including a more powerful chip and a new large language model.

item.title: UBS says China tech trade ‘makes a lot of sense’ as AI ecosystem grows
item.description: An expanding AI ecosystem and easing tensions with the U.S. are reviving the case for Chinese equities, particularly tech stocks, according to UBS.

item.title: China confirms order for 200 Boeing planes, calls aviation key area for U.S. cooperation
item.description: China has agreed to buy 200 Boeing jets, its first major order in nearly a decade, U.S. President Donald Trump said last week.

item.title: The AI economy is rewriting the American Dream — and blue-collar workers are poised to win
item.description: AI-driven hiring slowdowns are hitting some entry-level jobs for college graduates as companies like Ford and AT&T ramp up recruiting for skilled trade workers.

item.title: 2026 CNBC Disruptor 50: See the full list of companies, rankings, and a new leader in the AI race
item.description: CNBC reveals the 2026 Disruptor 50 list led by an increasingly powerful and highly valued group of AI companies.

item.title: Stocks are poised to handle a small hike in rates, according to the charts
item.description: There's a lot of time between now and a possible first rate hike, and a lot of room for market volatility as investors weigh this new reality.

item.title: New data boosts our confidence in Lilly's obesity pill. Plus, Google's new AI features
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: European stocks to open lower: UK inflation and elevated bond yields in focus
item.description: European stocks are expected to open in negative territory on Wednesday as global markets keep a close eye on elevated bond yields and UK inflation data.

item.title: SpaceX picks Goldman Sachs for lead left position on record-breaking IPO, sources say
item.description: SpaceX has picked Goldman Sachs to lead what's expected to be a record-setting IPO.

item.title: Trump's past tax returns get protection from IRS enforcement under 'lawfare' fund settlement
item.description: President Trump agreed to drop his lawsuit against the IRS in exchange for a fund that can compensate allies who were targeted under the Biden administration.

item.title: Ink Business Preferred vs. Capital One Venture Business: Which $95 annual fee business travel card is better?
item.description: The Ink Business Preferred and Capital One Venture Business both have $95 annual fees and earn flexible travel rewards.

item.title: AI boom reshuffles global stock market pecking order as South Korea and Taiwan surge
item.description: A global reshuffling in stock-market hierarchy is underway. AI is propelling Taiwan and South Korea past a couple long-established Western countries.

item.title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: The major averages slid on Tuesday, with the S&P 500 falling for a third session, as Treasury yields rose.

item.title: Nvidia to launch Singapore research hub as city-state boosts AI plans
item.description: Singapore has announced a new Nvidia research center and its first testbed to research, test and deploy physical AI, along with industry leaders.

item.title: Turn to dividend growth stocks to cushion your portfolio in a selloff, Trivariate Research says
item.description: The firm called out these stocks as solid dividend growers at a time when the search for defensive plays has changed.

item.title: Singapore inks AI deals with Google, OpenAI as ChatGPT-maker commits $234 million to local ecosystem
item.description: Singapore has signed new partnerships with Google and OpenAI to strengthen the city-state's position as a global AI hub and accelerating AI deployment.

item.title: U.S. airlines oppose Trump plan to require small airports to use private security, Reuters reports
item.description: A group representing major U.S. airlines opposes a White House proposal to require smaller airports to use private security screeners instead of the TSA.

item.title: Google debuts new AI models, personal AI agents in effort to keep pace with OpenAI and Anthropic
item.description: Google made a number of AI announcements at its annual developer conference, rolling out more-advanced models and agentic tools for its expansive user base.

item.title: Senate advances measure to end military action in Iran in rebuke to Trump
item.description: The war with Iran has now blown past the 60-day requirement under the War Powers Act for the president to seek the authorization of Congress.

item.title: Citi says it's the best buying set-up in this metal in 50 years
item.description: Aluminum prices are set to surge to average $4,000 per metric tonne in the second half of 2026, the bank said.

item.title: Goldman Sachs says AI and energy resilience are creating a North-South divide in Asian markets
item.description: North Asian markets are outperforming South Asian markets, supported by stronger fiscal ability and AI developments, Goldman said.

item.title: Asia markets fall as Treasury yields climb and Iran tensions linger
item.description: Asia-Pacific markets fell on Wednesday as investors weighed elevated bond yields and renewed geopolitical tensions.

item.title: Vance defends stock-trading spree in Trump financial filings: 'Come on, man'
item.description: Vice President JD Vance said at the White House on Tuesday that he and President Donald Trump both support banning congressional stock trading.
